personas.name: Live Negotiator
personas.description: Realtime judge-demo persona focused on interruption-safe negotiation, translation handoff, and KPI-aware offers.

personas.name: Story Director
personas.description: Creative storyteller persona for fast Hook -> Conflict -> Resolution narratives with multimodal asset planning.

personas.name: UI Operator
personas.description: UI navigation persona for approval-aware screen automation, replayable execution, and sandbox-safe recovery.

personas.name: Visa/Relocation Lead Intake
personas.description: Visa and relocation intake persona for capturing destination, timeline, document readiness, and the next step.

personas.name: Consultation Booking Assistant
personas.description: Scheduling persona for proposing times, confirming constraints, and staging booking actions.

personas.name: Visa/Relocation Document Collection
personas.description: Visa and relocation collection persona for checklist tracking, missing-item status, and approval-aware submission staging.

personas.name: Visa/Relocation Missing Documents Follow-up
personas.description: Follow-up persona for chasing missing visa and relocation documents with clear status, tone, and next action.

personas.name: Visa/Relocation Consultation Reminder
personas.description: Reminder persona for confirming visa and relocation consultation details, prep items, and reschedule paths.

personas.name: Visa/Relocation Case Escalation / Human Handoff
personas.description: Escalation persona for blocked visa and relocation cases that need human review, owner routing, and a concise handoff packet.

personas.name: Calendar Automation Publisher
personas.description: Managed-skill and plugin-marketplace persona for calendar workflows, signing demos, and install/resolve validation.

recipes.name: Live Negotiation Judge Demo
recipes.description: Show realtime negotiation with explicit constraints, interruption handling, and a fallback offer.
recipes.promptTemplate: Negotiate a delivery contract with hard constraints on price, delivery, and SLA. Restate the constraints first, keep the exchange concise, and finish with a primary offer plus one fallback option.

recipes.name: Story Hook Conflict Resolution
recipes.description: Generate a short narrative with a clear hook, conflict, and resolution lane for timeline preview.
recipes.promptTemplate: Create a short three-part story arc with a memorable hook, a visible conflict, and a satisfying resolution. Include image, audio, and video-friendly moments for each segment.

recipes.name: UI Sandbox Form Review
recipes.description: Run a sandbox-safe form inspection flow with approval gates and concise execution notes.
recipes.promptTemplate: Inspect a web form, summarize the intended clicks and typed fields before execution, and stop for approval before any submit action. Prefer sandbox-safe read/preview steps first.

recipes.name: Visa/Relocation Lead Intake
recipes.description: Qualify a visa or relocation lead, capture structured intake, and stage the next action safely.
recipes.promptTemplate: Qualify a visa or relocation lead in the user's language. Ask 5 to 7 concrete intake questions about destination, visa or relocation type, nationality, timeline, dependents, documents, and blockers. Restate a structured summary with the lead profile, risks, and next step. Ask for approval only if a browser action or irreversible change is needed.

recipes.name: Consultation Booking Flow
recipes.description: Propose booking options, confirm constraints, and stage the appointment safely.
recipes.promptTemplate: Book or stage a consultation. Clarify language, timezone, and constraints. Propose two concrete time options, keep the flow concise, and ask for approval before submitting any booking or calendar action.

recipes.name: Visa/Relocation Document Collection
recipes.description: Collect visa or relocation documents, track missing items, and verify the final submission path.
recipes.promptTemplate: Collect visa or relocation document information. Build a checklist, mark each item as has or missing, and finish with a concrete missing-items summary. Stage browser forms carefully, ask for approval before any sensitive submission, and verify the result after execution.

recipes.name: Visa/Relocation Missing Documents Follow-up
recipes.description: Follow up on outstanding visa or relocation documents with a checklist, status, and one clear next action.
recipes.promptTemplate: Follow up on missing visa or relocation documents. Review the checklist, mark each required item as has or missing, ask only for the missing items, and finish with a short missing-items summary and next action. Keep the tone polite and agency-ready. Ask for approval before any outbound message or calendar update.

recipes.name: Visa/Relocation Consultation Reminder
recipes.description: Remind a client about a visa or relocation consultation with concrete appointment details and prep steps.
recipes.promptTemplate: Draft a visa or relocation consultation reminder. Confirm the appointment date, time, timezone, meeting mode, and preparation items. Include what the client should bring, how to join, and how to reschedule if needed. Ask for approval before any outbound message or calendar update.

recipes.name: Visa/Relocation Case Escalation / Human Handoff
recipes.description: Escalate a blocked visa or relocation case with a concise human handoff packet and a single owner action.
recipes.promptTemplate: Escalate a visa or relocation case to a human owner when the issue is blocked, high risk, or needs agency judgment. Produce a concise handoff packet with case context, current status, blocker, urgency, and the exact human action needed. Keep the summary operator-friendly, avoid legal advice, and ask for approval before sending anything externally.

recipes.name: Calendar Managed Skill Lifecycle
recipes.description: Validate signed managed-skill publish, install, and resolve lanes using the calendar sample skill.
recipes.promptTemplate: Use the calendar automation flow to validate managed skill registry lifecycle, plugin signing, installation resolve state, and operator evidence lanes.
